title: rhododendron atlanticum var. luteoalbum
intro: Rhododendron atlanticum var. luteoalbum, also known as the yellow azalea, is a flowering plant that is a variety of Rhododendron atlanticum. It is a medicinal plant that has been used in traditional medicine for its various health benefits. The plant has been found to have antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which can help to treat wounds, reduce fever, and protect against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Rhododendron atlanticum var. luteoalbum, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, can be used to promote digestive health, reduce stress and anxiety, and support the immune system.
